    protected ExecutionValue[]
    ExecutionVariable.instantiateValuesFromSideProof(InitConfig initConfig, Services services, TermBuilder tb, ApplyStrategyInfo<Proof,Goal> info, Operator resultOperator, JTerm siteProofSelectTerm, JTerm siteProofCondition)
    Analyzes the side proof defined by the ApplyStrategyInfo and creates ExecutionValues from it.

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util with parameters of type ApplyStrategyInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.disposeOrStore(String description, ApplyStrategyInfo<Proof,Goal> info)
    Stores or disposes the Proof of the ApplyStrategyInfo in SideProofStore.DEFAULT_INSTANCE.
    static JTerm
    SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.extractOperatorTerm(ApplyStrategyInfo<Proof,Goal> info, Operator operator)
    Extracts the operator term for the formula with the given Operator from the site proof result (ApplyStrategyInfo).

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final ApplyStrategyInfo<Proof,Goal>
    DefaultProver.doWork(GoalChooser<Proof,Goal> goalChooser, StopCondition<Goal> stopCondition)
    Executes the proof strategy by applying rules to goals until no further rules can be applied, a stop condition is met, or the thread is interrupted.
